subject: Workstation configurations
body:
I was wondering if anyone had any feedback on two GPU workstation 
configurations I'm considering for our Warp setup. I currently image with a 
K2 with 400 frames and 50 fractions per movie on our Krios. Basically 
wondering if the cheaper one will handle the load or if I should get the 
more expensive version to be safe or if there is some other changes I 
should make to the them.

Thanks for your help,

Bob Ashley
Facility Manager UC San Diego
